title: How to reset your password in our application
content: If you have forgotten your password or simply want to change it, you can reset it from the sign-in screen. Select "Forgot password?", enter the email address associated with your account, and we will email you a secure reset link. Open the link, choose a new password, and confirm it to regain access. For your security, the reset link expires after a short period and can only be used once.
